test-case.name: UnknownResultQueriesWarnOnce
test-case.output: NowMarkup: queried click "sve", but the document declares no matching id or state key. Declared ids: save; state keys: (none).

test-case.name: ShapingAffectsTypographyOrIsNeutral
test-case.output: NotoSans applied the fi ligature; shaped glyph count < character count.
